name: Environment issues
messageRegex: .*(Connection refused|ConnectionResetError|Connection aborted|Read timed out|ConnectTimeout|TimeoutError|Temporary failure in name resolution|Name or service not known|502 Bad Gateway|503 Service Unavailable|504 Gateway Timeout).*

name: Playwright/browser issues
messageRegex: .*(Playwright|Timeout [0-9]+ms exceeded|Target page, context or browser has been closed|locator|strict mode violation|net::ERR_|page\.goto|browser).*
